chunks.title: 15_Hr Tag
chunks.text: Next element is my HR tag, which is a horizontal rule element. Horizontal rule element is a way in which my page takes breaks. If I have written a lot of lines, I have written a paragraph, this is my name, which is Shraddha, I have written a lot of texts in this way.

chunks.title: 15_Hr Tag
chunks.text: this is my name, which is Shraddha, I have written a lot of texts in this way. And I want a line to come in between which divides my page from this part and this part. So basically, to bring breaks in the page, I use the HR tag. In the HR tag, our opening and closing tag is not different, it is just a single tag.

chunks.title: 15_Hr Tag
chunks.text: In the HR tag, our opening and closing tag is not different, it is just a single tag. Like the way I wrote the angular bracket, my HR and closing bracket. Now this tag is exactly similar to my BR tag. What was the BR tag? BR tag used to give me a line break.

chunks.title: 15_Hr Tag
chunks.text: What was the BR tag? BR tag used to give me a line break. Whereas HR tag is like a divider for me. What are we going to do to learn this? I am going to write some paragraphs in my HTML document.

chunks.text: I am going to write some paragraphs in my HTML document. Suppose I wrote one paragraph, this is my name, which is Shraddha, Thapra. Let's make another paragraph. I am your web development teacher.

chunks.text: Let's do this save and now run again. This horizontal line is on the screen. This means that a divider or a horizontal line is created on the page. We can use this line to divide the page into different sections.
